message:
🐛 Fix kubectlProxy test mocks: add missing STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN and BACKEND_HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS (#10211)

The constants mock in 4 kubectlProxy test files was missing
STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN and BACKEND_HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS exports.
This caused wsAuth.ts (imported transitively) to fail with:
'No STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN export is defined on the constants mock'

Fixes 124 test failures across hourly coverage shards 2, 4, and 12.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,13 +23,15 @@ vi.mock('../constants', () => ({
   LOCAL_AGENT_WS_URL: 'ws://127.0.0.1:8585/ws',
   WS_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS: 2500,
   WS_CONNECTION_COOLDOWN_MS: 5000,
+  BACKEND_HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS: 3000,
   KUBECTL_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS: 10_000,
   KUBECTL_EXTENDED_TIMEOUT_MS: 30_000,
   KUBECTL_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS: 45_000,
   METRICS_SERVER_TIMEOUT_MS: 5_000,
   MAX_CONCURRENT_KUBECTL_REQUESTS: 4,
   POD_RESTART_ISSUE_THRESHOLD: 5,
   FOCUS_DELAY_MS: 100,
+  STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN: 'token',
 }))
 
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
